task_completion.description: Select the 'Artist' table as the data source for the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LibreOffice Base Report Wizard window with 'Table: Artist' selected in the 'Tables or queries' dropdown, or the Report Builder linked to the Artist table.

task_completion.description: Include the ArtistId and Name fields in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ArtistId' and 'Name' in the 'Fields in report' list within the Report Wizard, or as column headers/text boxes in the Report Builder design view or final generated report.

task_completion.description: Set the report layout to Tabular
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Tabular' layout option being selected in the layout step of the Report Wizard, or the final report displaying data in a standard tabular format (columns with headers).

task_completion.description: Set the report page orientation to Landscape
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Landscape' radio button being selected in the Report Wizard, or the final report/design view showing a page layout that is wider than it is tall.

task_completion.description: Name the report 'Artist Catalog' and save it
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Artist Catalog' entered as the title in the final step of the Report Wizard, the title bar of the generated report window reading 'Artist Catalog', or the report listed as 'Artist Catalog' under the 'Reports' section in the main LibreOffice Base window.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Base GUI to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Base application interface (Report Wizard or Report Builder) should be visible in the screenshots. The agent should not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The report is a genuine LibreOffice Base report object
integrity.visual_evidence: The report must be created within the Base environment (appearing in the Reports pane), not just a mock-up created in LibreOffice Writer or Calc.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly manipulate the database files
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be open executing sqlite3 commands, python scripts, or other CLI tools to generate the report output outside of LibreOffice.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database is the official Chinook music store database. The 'Artist' table contains exactly 275 records and consists of the fields 'ArtistId' (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY) and 'Name' (NVARCHAR(120)). If the VLM sees the final generated report, it should display these fields and contain 275 rows of real artist data.
